g.text: Reactor Pattern: Architecture and Component Roles (reactor.c)
REACTOR | Readiness: fd ready -> app reads
PROACTOR | Completion: app asks -> kernel notifies finish
REACTOR | Used by: NGINX, Redis, libuv
PROACTOR | Used by: io_uring, Windows IOCP
fd=3 | EPOLLIN (NIC DMA filled recv buffer)
O(1) append by kernel interrupt handler
Runs after ALL I/O in current tick
dispatching is zero: epoll_ctl is immediate
